description: Builds an index from a FASTA formatted file of target sequences for use with Kallisto.
author: Edwin Huang;Mesirov Lab - UCSD
plan:
## Kallisto.Indexer GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
Kallisto.Indexer is a GenePattern module that Builds an index from a FASTA formatted file of target sequences for use with Kallisto.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 4 parameters:
- Required: FASTA.files
- Optional: output.filename, k-mer.size, make.unique

### 3. Command Line
```
/opt/genepatt/src/run_kallisto_indexer.sh <output.filename> <make.unique> <k-mer.size> <FASTA.files>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/kallisto.indexer\:v0.1

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: FASTA.files
parameters.description: FASTA formatted file of target sequences. Can be in plaintext or gzipped (.gz) format. Can upload more than one file and can be a mix of .gz and .fa files.

parameters.name: output.filename
parameters.description: Filename for the kallisto index to be constructed.

parameters.name: k-mer.size
parameters.description: Odd length of k-mers. Default is 31, max values is 31.

parameters.name: make.unique
parameters.description: Replace repeated target names with unique names.
